description:
Perform a data integrity validation for surgical case #6 from the VitalDB dataset ('C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\vitaldb_case_006.vital'). Determine the maximum Heart Rate (HR) value during the first 10 minutes (0-600 seconds) of the recording using both visual inspection in Vital Recorder and programmatic verification. Save a screenshot of the GUI showing the peak HR to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\gui_peak_capture.png'. Create a Python script 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\verify_peak.py' that uses the 'vitaldb' library to extract the 'Solar8000/HR' track and compute the maximum value for the first 600 seconds. Document the results in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\VitalRecorder\validation_report.txt' using the following format:
GUI Observed Peak: [Your visual number]
API Computed Peak: [Your script result]
Match: [YES/NO]
